comments: Approved. The review packet and execution contract define the goal as purging tracked/present .DS_Store artifacts and ensuring '.DS_Store' is ignored in .gitignore. Given the acknowledged execution facts that '.DS_Store' was already present in .gitignore and git rm confirmed there were no tracked .DS_Store files in the Git index, the repository was already clean relative to Git. Under that clean starting state, a no-diff implementation outcome is correct, and successful artifact generation satisfies the required output expectations.
